Zambian non governmental organization that promotes climate and environmental justice

orgs.n: Citizens Network for Community Development Zambia
orgs.d: A non-profit organization focused on empowering citizens, particularly youth and women, to drive social change, advocate for rights, and advance climate resilience in Zambia.
Zambian youth-led non-governmental organization working on women’s health, sexual and reproductive rights
Non-governmental organization focused on youth empowerment and community development
Zambian country program of AIDS Healthcare Foundation, providing HIV/AIDS prevention, testing and treatment
Zambian non-governmental organization focused on youth empowerment
